improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access with membership."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access with membership.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the core value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, or messaging apps—critical for B2B audiences who often discover tools through peer sharing. Including the three free searches hook creates a low-friction call to action directly in the preview.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for business owners and traders. Try three searches free, no card required."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it serves (trade and business professionals). The subheading reinforces key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while removing friction with the free trial mention and 'no card required' trust signal. It's specific without overpromising and guides visitors toward action.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and Gideon's full professional capabilities whenever you need them.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and value received, it reduces uncertainty, builds trust, and encourages conversion at the paywall moment.
